WildFingleBush.name: Wild Fingle Bush
WildFingleBush.effectDesc: It tastes like spinich but honeslty not too bad, you gain 1 HP
WildFingleBush.desc: A small plant with large green leaves, the leaves are triangular and connected to a small twig as a base.
WildFingleBush.isBoiled: the water slowly turns a redish hue as you boiled the plant, after fully steeping the liquid is slight red. It doesnt look very strong.
